title: ranunculus arvensis var. echinatissimus
intro: Ranunculus arvensis var. echinatissimus, a lesser-known variety of the lesser celandine plant, is a flowering perennial with yellow flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus arvensis var. echinatissimus include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a potential natural remedy for various skin issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to alleviate skin irritations and promote overall skin health.
